steps.instruction: Ensure the Branch TestBed app is open on its main screen. If you see buttons like 'Create Branch Link', 'Native Share Branch Link', you are already on the main screen. If you are on a different screen (e.g. a log screen, a dialog, or any other app), press Back repeatedly until you reach the main screen, or go to the device home screen, then find and open the 'Branch-SDK-TestBed' app.
Tap on the button that says exactly 'Native Share Branch Link'. Do not scroll.

Wait up to 5 seconds for a sharing bottom sheet to appear. Look for the text 'Sharing Branch Short URL' and a URL containing 'bnctestbed.app.link'. If both are visible, succeed. If not, fail the test.
Press the back button or tap outside the sharing bottom sheet to dismiss it. Succeed when the bottom sheet is closed and the main screen is visible again.
